column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a shiny red strawberry" | TEXT="いちご" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Eating a strawberry playfully" | TEXT="あーん" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling brightly with a juicy bite" | TEXT="あまい！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a basket of strawberries" | TEXT="たくさん採れた" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a strawberry" | TEXT="ひとつどうぞ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a harvested bamboo shoot (takenoko)" | TEXT="立派な筍" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Cooking takenoko rice" | TEXT="筍ごはん" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Serving a bowl of rice happily" | TEXT="できたてですよ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing contentedly after eating" | TEXT="春の味覚"
